datasheet.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced .
datasheet.name: Forlorn Hero

datasheet.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll . While this model’s unit is not within 6" of one or more friendly BLOOD ANGELS CHARACTER models, or 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0.
datasheet.name: Black Rage

datasheet.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the attacking unit contains the enemy WARLORD : on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds ; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D6+3 mortal wounds.
datasheet.name: Death Vision of Sanguinius

unit_composition.text: Blood Song; bolt pistol; Dead Man’s Hand.
